name: Partner-Level Tax Elections

eligibility.description: Available to partners in a partnership for specific items including foreign taxes and debt discharge.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows individual partners to make separate elections for foreign tax credits (IRC 901), mining exploration expenditures (IRC 617), and discharge of indebtedness income (IRC 108) rather than being bound by a partnership-level choice.
